name: pdca-skill-creator
description: Create PDCA-based Codex skills with Do-script run plan docs, step-by-step parameter confirmation tables, preflight automation confirmation, Codex scheduling classification, installable-plugin gates, source-safe smoke tests, two-layer generated-skill scoring, business-core-first execution, evidence-backed maturity grading, self-optimization matrices, crawler scaffolds, contract-consistent checks, clean packaging, logs, and reports.

interface.longDescription: Create Codex skills that follow a PDCA loop with Plan, Do, Check, and Act stages while preserving the business core first. It requires a Do-script run plan document for executable skills, explaining the run entrypoint, parameter table, preflight checks, execution steps, outputs, logs, observable progress, failure diagnosis, Check handoff, and user confirmation points. It also requires a step-by-step confirmation table for automation skills, covering each parameter, current value or default, confirmation status, unresolved risk, and handling action. It confirms data sources, output formats, trigger plans, and runtime parameters before generating automation skills; distinguishes local scheduler scripts from Codex arranged tasks; generates core implementation plans, crawler scaffolds for page inspection tasks, selector and field extraction matrices, evidence-backed maturity grading, capability matrices, layered self-optimization evaluation with retest evidence paths, generic generated-skill quality gates, business-specific use case test scripts, executable scaffolds, contract-consistent rule-driven checks, plugin-aware use case tests, source-safe smoke tests, clean installable plugin directories, evidence, logs, health diagnosis, historical requirements, and iterative creator use case test reports.
defaultPrompt: Use $pdca-skill-creator to create a skill for a recurring workflow.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to upgrade an existing workflow skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to design a self-checking inspection skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to run iterative creator use case tests and improve the creator rules.
